title: Plugin Remove
objective: Install and uninstall a local external plugin, then verify OpenClaw removes plugin install records cleanly and survives restart.

phases.title: Install Plugin To Remove
phases.intent: Install the local fixture so uninstall exercises a real managed plugin record.

phases.title: Uninstall Plugin
phases.intent: Use OpenClaw's real uninstall path and force promptless removal for automation.

phases.title: Restart After Removal
phases.intent: Restart after uninstall to verify removed plugin state does not break gateway startup.
